InstructionData.Title: NewSolar
InstructionData.Description: New solar script from Creative mode.​
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
INIT: alias dDSHorz d0 alias dDSVert d1 alias dLMHorz d2 alias dLMVert d3 alias dDisp1 d4 alias dDisp2 d5
alias rVert r1 alias rHorz r2
s dDSHorz Mode 1 s dDSVert Mode 2
LOOP1: l rVert dDSVert SolarAngle l rHorz dDSHorz SolarAngle sub rVert 75 rVert # r? = a - b div rVert rVert 1.5 # r? = a / b #max rVert rVert 0 sub rHorz 270 rHorz trunc rHorz rHorz trunc rVert rVert s dLMHorz Setting rHorz s dLMVert Setting rVert s dDisp1 Setting rHorz s dDisp2 Setting rVert yield j LOOP1
